LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS FRANCES M. BRUCIA (TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH B. & FRANCIS M. BRUCIA 2001 REVOCABLE TRUST), AND JOSEPH B. AND FRANCES M. BRUCIA 2001 REVOCABLE TRUST'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 3, 7 THROUGH 9 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD A BASIS THAT WOULD AVOID STATUTE OF LIMITATION AND SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6. IT IS FURTHER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FRAUD CAUSES OF ACTION FOR THE PLAINTIFF TO BE ABLE TO AMEND AND WORK INTO WHATEVER THE UNLTIMATE COMPLAINT TURNS OUT TO BE. MR. BURNS IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
